creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
I updated the fwf port acording to the version that came with 2.2.5R.
I used Lesstif with it and I excluded the demos (already too much bloat).
I haven't tested this thoroughly, but it seems to work better than the
previous port.

How-To-Repeat: I'll drop the tarball in incoming at request, but this diff should work
